title: House of the Rising Sun
why_this_song: House of the Rising Sun by The Animals (1964) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 4 times; first heard in: "There is a house in New Orleans"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "There is a house in New Orleans"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "They call the Rising Sun"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "There is a house in New Orleans"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "They call the Rising Sun"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "orleans" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "orleans" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "house" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: There is a house in New Orleans
Now the only thing a gambler needs
In the House of the Rising Sun

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Well, I got one foot on the platform

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "House of the Rising Sun" was released in 1964. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "House of the Rising Sun" foi lançada em 1964. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
